name: Barri Office
description_short: Barri is a money services company offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and mobile recharges primarily for Latin American remittance customers.
description_long:
Barri is a financial services provider with over 30 years of experience in international money transfers and check cashing. The company operates a network of physical store locations combined with a mobile app to serve Spanish-speaking communities, particularly those sending remittances to Mexico, Central America, and South America.

Their core service offerings include check cashing with extended hours and competitive rates, international money transfers via online, mobile app, or in-store, bill payment services, mobile phone recharges across the US and Latin America, a Visa debit card branded as "Barri," and personal loans from $300 to $10,000 through a partnership with Oportun. The company emphasizes convenience, with services accessible through physical locations, their mobile application, and online channels.

Barri distinguishes itself through its dual-channel approach combining physical retail locations with digital tools, its partnership with Oportun to offer credit products, and a strong brand reputation reflected in 4.9-star app ratings. The company positions itself as a complete financial management platform for immigrants and Latin American diaspora communities rather than a single-service provider.

While Barri provides genuine value through extended check-cashing hours and multi-channel access, consumers should note that specific fee structures are not disclosed on the website, the company's lending is limited to $10,000 through Oportun partnership rather than direct lending, and pricing comparisons with competitors cannot be made from available information.
pros: Extended hours for check cashing with convenient rates explicitly mentioned
Dual-channel access: 4,000+ physical store locations plus full-featured mobile app
International money transfer service to Mexico, Central America, and South America
Partnership with Oportun enables credit building with personal loans from $300-$10,000
Multi-service platform includes bill payment, mobile recharges, wire transfers, and money orders
Mobile app supports complete financial management (transfers, recharges, bill payments) from one interface
30+ years of company history in money transfer industry provides stability
cons: Specific check-cashing fees and exchange rates not disclosed on website
Personal loans capped at $10,000 and limited to partnership with Oportun
No transparent APR or rate information provided for loan products
Website is Spanish-language primary, may create barriers for non-Spanish speakers
Service geography appears limited to US-based senders to Latin America primarily
best_for: Latin American immigrants and diaspora communities sending remittances
Spanish-speaking consumers needing convenient check cashing with extended hours
Unbanked or underbanked individuals seeking multi-service financial platform
US-based workers earning cash who need check cashing and bill payment services
diagnosis: Barri is best for Spanish-speaking immigrants and diaspora communities who need multiple financial services (check cashing, money transfers, bill payment) in one location or app. The main caveat is that specific fee schedules and loan APRs are not disclosed online, and lending capacity is limited to $10,000 through a third-party partnership rather than direct loans.
services: Check cashing with extended hours and competitive rates
International money transfers to Mexico, Central America, and South America
Mobile phone recharges (US and Latin America)
Multi-currency account management and remittance management
